div.div: Kueue 的治理能力：配额与公平性的产品化

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 457px; margin-left: 23px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
• Kueue 只负责调度前的准入与配额管理，不做实际调度
• 与 kube-scheduler 或 Volcano 协同工作形成完整的调度流程
• 依赖数据平面提供资源单位和可观测信号

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 204, 188), rgb(89, 45, 32)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(216, 67, 21), rgb(255, 131, 92));

g.text: 核心关系：Kueue 决定能不能跑、跑多少；调度器决定具体跑在哪；数据平面决定跑起来后会不会互相影响
